segments.text: Five hidden messages that you have probably never noticed. In tostitos, the two T's are actually people sharing
chips and salsa over the dot of I. TE France hides the cyclist within the letters. And the yellow dot, that's the
leader's jersey. Who could have thought a race would be drawn with just the letters? The H in Hyundai isn't just a letter. It's two people shaking hands.
That's actually trust baked in the logo,
which is mind-blowing. Beats turn the bee into a person wearing headphones.
Simple, personal, and genius. FedEx hides a arrow between E and X. The designer only spotted it like after 200
drafts. Once you see it, you can't unsee it. That's the magic of great design. If you want more amazing design content, subscribe.
